# ona_project_insights (List Resource)

Lists Ona Project Insights status for existing projects.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "ona_project_insights" "all" {
  provider         = ona
  include_resource = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `project_ids` (List of String) Project IDs to inspect. Defaults to all projects.
